summary: The resolution of an IOPA radiograph generally falls within approximately 10-20 line pairs per centimeter, sufficient for detecting major anatomical features without needing ultra-high precision required by specialized medical applications like computed tomography scans which can achieve significantly finer detail beyond what is necessary during general dentistry examinations.
